ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user's account */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* User's birthdate */,
  "gender" TEXT /* User's gender */,
  "height" INTEGER /* User's height in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* User's weight in kilograms */,
  "fitness_level" TEXT /* User's fitness level (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number for contact and verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_types" (
  "activity_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity type */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the physical activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "calories_burned_per_minute" REAL /* Calories burned per minute for this activity */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the activity (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "recommended_frequency" TEXT /* Recommended frequency of the activity (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of activity performed */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity in minutes */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the activity was performed */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the activity */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the activity */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the activity was performed */,
  "device_synced" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the activity was synced from a device */,
  "manual_entry" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the activity was manually entered by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_records_activity_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_type_id") REFERENCES activity_types ("activity_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_records_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the goal */,
  "activity_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of activity for the goal */,
  "target_duration" INTEGER /* Target duration of the activity in minutes */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the goal */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the goal */,
  "current_duration" INTEGER /* Current duration of the activity achieved towards the goal */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the goal was updated */,
  "notification_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of notifications for the goal (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_activity_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_type_id") REFERENCES activity_types ("activity_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "challenges" (
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each challenge */,
  "challenge_name" TEXT /* Name of the challenge */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the challenge */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the challenge */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the challenge */,
  "participant_count" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the challenge */,
  "average_progress" REAL /* Average progress of participants in the challenge */,
  "reward" TEXT /* Reward for completing the challenge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("challenge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "challenge_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant in a challenge */,
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the challenge */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user participating in the challenge */,
  "progress" INTEGER /* Progress towards the challenge goal */,
  "last_active_date" TEXT /* Last date the participant was active in the challenge */,
  "activity_points" INTEGER /* Points earned through activities in the challenge */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the participant in the challenge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_challenge_participants_challenge_id FOREIGN KEY ("challenge_id") REFERENCES challenges ("challenge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_challenge_participants_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the report is for */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the user's activity */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the activities */,
  "health_metrics" TEXT /* Health metrics (e.g., steps, calories burned) */,
  "comparative_metrics" TEXT /* Comparative metrics with peers or goals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "sync_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was last synchronized */,
  "battery_level" TEXT /* Battery level of the device */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., smartwatch, fitness band) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_devices_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_sync" (
  "sync_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each synchronization event */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device from which data was synchronized */,
  "activity_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of activity synchronized */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity in minutes */,
  "sync_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was synchronized */,
  "sync_status" TEXT /* Status of the sync (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the sync failed */,
  "sync_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the sync process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sync_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_sync_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES user_devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_sync_activity_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_type_id") REFERENCES activity_types ("activity_type_id")
)
